expectations.text: Uses git fetch upstream followed by git merge upstream/main while on local main as the default safe path.
expectations.evidence: The response recommends fetching upstream, switching to main, and merging upstream/main as the default safe path.

expectations.text: Mentions checking for a clean worktree before syncing or tells the user to commit or stash pending changes.
expectations.evidence: The response tells the user to run git status and stash pending changes before syncing.

expectations.text: Does not recommend force-pushing main as the default solution.
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly argues against rebasing and force-pushing main as the safest default.
